name: Patient
history: Death of a close aunt whom the patient considered a mother figure. The patient did not fulfill the aunt's last request and was not present at the time of death. Pattern of prioritizing others' needs over their own.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must take care of others to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't meet others' needs, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Prioritizing others' needs over personal desires.
situation: On the way to watch a movie, received a call from a friend seeking emotional support. Chose to give up the movie and talked with the friend for about an hour.
auto_thought: I can't let them down; they need me.
behavior: Gave up personal plans to support a friend.
